caption:
5 things not to miss in DIFC

🤍 Art Sculptures: DIFC grounds is an open-air art gallery that you can visit for free!

🤍 Food Pop-ups: Peppers, More Matcha, Two Point Oh 

🤍 Fancy Restaurants for special dates: Amazonico, Zuma, Clap, and so much more! 

🤍 Amazing architecture: Featured in this reel is the DIFC Grand Mosque. You’ll find more interesting structures around the area!

🤍 Burj Khalifa view from the Gate Avenue

Save this for your next Dubai trip!
